subcodes.first_line: O Beloved! The Book of Divine Knowledge hath been sent down from the Countenance of Certitude. It hath carried away the heart and bestowed the spirit, hath borne away the soul and granted strength [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبوبا دفتر عرفان از طلعه ایقان نازل دل برد و روان داد جان برد و توان داد
subcodes.subjects: @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation
